name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're trying to solve

<!--
What are you trying to do that RIFT currently makes hard or impossible?
Lead with the user's goal, not the proposed solution.
-->

## What you tried

<!--
What workarounds have you already considered? Why aren't they
sufficient? This helps us understand the constraint, not just the wish.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Optional. If you have a concrete idea, describe it. Include CLI shape,
config surface, MCP tool name, etc. if relevant.
-->

## Who else needs this

<!--
A feature for one user is a fork. A feature for many users is a roadmap
item. Help us understand the audience.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other tools, papers, etc. -->
